inquiries.name: John Mwangi
inquiries.subject: Test Drive Request
inquiries.message: Hi, I'm interested in the 2019 Volkswagen Golf TDI. I would like to schedule a test drive this weekend. Please let me know if Saturday morning is available. Thank you.

inquiries.name: Fatima Khamis
inquiries.subject: Financing Options
inquiries.message: Good morning, I am looking at the 2018 Mazda CX-8 listed at KES 3,550,000. Could you provide information on financing options? I can put down about 40% deposit and would like to know the monthly installments for a 48-month plan.

inquiries.name: Peter Otieno
inquiries.subject: Vehicle Availability
inquiries.message: Hello, I saw the 2020 Toyota Landcruiser Prado TX on your website and I'm very interested. Is it still available? I'd like to come view it this week. Also, do you offer any warranty on used vehicles?
inquiries.notes: Called customer — Prado is still available. Scheduled viewing for Thursday.

inquiries.name: Sarah Wanjiku
inquiries.subject: Service Appointment
inquiries.message: I purchased a Nissan Note from you last year and it's due for its 10,000 km service. Can I book an appointment for next Tuesday? Also, please confirm the service cost for a standard oil change and inspection.
inquiries.notes: Booked for Tuesday 10am. Service cost approx. KES 8,500.

inquiries.name: James Kiprop
inquiries.subject: Price Negotiation
inquiries.message: I'm writing regarding the 2019 Nissan Note E-Power listed at KES 1,580,000. I am a serious buyer and would like to make an offer of KES 1,400,000 cash. Would you consider this price? I can complete the purchase this week.

inquiries.name: Mary Akinyi
inquiries.subject: Complaint — Delayed Documents
inquiries.message: I bought a Toyota Raize from your dealership on June 1st but I still haven't received the logbook and transfer documents. I've called three times and was told it would be sorted. This is unacceptable. Please escalate and resolve urgently.
inquiries.notes: Escalated to admin. Logbook is at KRA — should be ready by Friday. Called Mary to update her.

inquiries.name: David Kamau
inquiries.subject: Trade-In Question
inquiries.message: Hello, I'm interested in upgrading to a newer SUV and I currently drive a 2015 Subaru Forester. Do you accept trade-ins? And would you be able to give me a valuation before I visit your lot?

inquiries.name: Grace Omondi
inquiries.subject: Test Drive — Toyota Raize
inquiries.message: I'd like to schedule a test drive for the 2018 Toyota Raize. I'm free on Saturday afternoon around 2pm. Please confirm if that works and let me know your location.

inquiries.name: Samuel Njenga
inquiries.subject: Loan Financing Inquiry
inquiries.message: Hi there, I'm interested in financing a vehicle worth approximately KES 3,000,000. What interest rates do you offer and what is the minimum deposit required? I am a first-time car buyer and would appreciate guidance on the process.

inquiries.name: Esther Nyambura
inquiries.subject: Service Feedback
inquiries.message: I brought my Volkswagen Golf in for service last week and the team was very professional. However, I noticed a small rattle from the dashboard after picking it up. Could you please check this? It wasn't there before the service.

inquiries.name: Test User
inquiries.subject: General Inquiry
inquiries.message: This is a test inquiry message.
